audit_summary: The platform is currently a functional skeleton. The UI/UX layout is high-quality, but backend connectivity is missing across 80% of the site, and critical responsive bugs prevent basic navigation at default zoom levels.

priority_1_critical_fixes.fix: Update CSS media queries for viewport stability.

priority_1_critical_fixes.issue: Hamburger menu is unresponsive; 404s on /tnf-hub and /audit-logs.
priority_1_critical_fixes.fix: Wire onClick handlers and register missing routes.

priority_1_critical_fixes.issue: Command+C hijacked; Agent Fleet /agents route crashes the app.
priority_1_critical_fixes.fix: Restore native clipboard events and debug route initialization.

structural_pivots.command_center: Remove current Iframe-based architecture. Replace with native React 'Agent Card' components.
structural_pivots.documentation: Documentation routes (/docs/*) currently do not load content. Routing logic needs to be connected to a CMS or local markdown files.

grid_cluster.dashboard: Skeleton shell; needs connection to event ledger.
grid_cluster.timeline: Functional UI; needs data hookup to /ledger API.
grid_cluster.tasks: Wired form at /tasks/new; requires 'Create' logic verification.

forge_cluster.ai_portal: Route works; 'Deploy' buttons are mock-state only.
forge_cluster.workflows: Builder UI is present; needs JSON schema persistence and Save API.

nexus_cluster.mcp_hub: Server inventory endpoint is currently unavailable (0 stats).

apex_cluster.admin: Dashboard values remain at 0; telemetry not connected.
apex_cluster.debug: Internal dev tool; should be restricted/removed from production.

user_interface.user_menu: Dropdown functional but lacks Billing, Team Management, and Seats.
user_interface.appearance: Theme and Font scaling inputs are disconnected from CSS variables.
user_interface.toasts: Global feedback system (Success/Error notifications) is missing.

strategic_roadmap: Implement WebSockets for real-time status pills (Mesh/Agent status).
Switch to a centralized state manager (Redux/Context) for global appearance settings.
Replace 'Marketplace' with 'Capabilities Map' to align with current content.
